description_long: This object is a clustered group of standard traffic cones, commonly used for road safety and access control in urban environments. The cones are primarily orange with white reflective stripes and feature black, weighted bases for stability. Some cones are equipped with yellow warning lights attached to their tips, enhancing visibility in low-light conditions. The cones are arranged both upright and lying on their sides, showing their hollow, conical structure and robust, grippy bases. The surfaces appear clean and well-maintained, with no visible logos or markings. The overall condition suggests the cones are new or only lightly used, suitable for deployment in public spaces.
description: A group of orange and white traffic cones with black bases, some featuring yellow warning lights. The cones are clean, well-maintained, and arranged in a cluster.
description_view_0: Several traffic cones, both upright and toppled, are visible with their orange bodies, white stripes, and black bases; yellow warning lights are attached to some cones.
description_view_1: The cones are seen from a different angle, highlighting the upright cones with attached yellow lights and the hollow bases of those lying down.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the black bases and the conical shapes, with the yellow warning lights clearly visible on some cones.
description_view_3: The cones are mostly viewed from behind, showing the bases and the arrangement of cones in a tight cluster.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has one or two white reflective stripes, placed horizontally around the upper and mid-sections, each stripe approximately 8-10 cm wide.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed and solid orange, with some cones featuring a yellow warning light attachment at the top.
attribute_base_design: The base is wide, hexagonal, and black, made of heavy rubber for stability, with a textured, grippy surface.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any of the cones.
attribute_condition: The cones appear new or lightly used, with clean surfaces and no visible damage or fading.
